domain.title: Auth0 Domain
domain.description: Your Auth0 domain (e.g. my-tenant.us.auth0.com or a custom domain). Found in Auth0 dashboard under Applications > APIs > Settings. Supports EL

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: Expected audience (aud claim) for incoming access tokens. This is the API Identifier configured in the Auth0 dashboard (e.g. https://my-api.example.com). Validating the audience prevents token confusion attacks. Supports EL

userClaim.title: User claim
userClaim.description: Claim field used to identify the end user in analytics logs. Defaults to 'sub' (subject). Supports EL
